# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# server.properties
broker.id=1  # Change to your Broker Id
listeners=PLAINTEXT://localhost:9092  # Listening port
log.dirs=/tmp/kafka-logs  # Log directory path
num.partitions=8   # Number of partitions per topic
offsets.topic.replication.factor=3    # Replicate the offsets topic for high availability
transaction.state.log.replication.factor=2     # Transaction state log replication factor to ensure durability 
log.retention.minutes=10080   # Set retention time for logs
zookeeper.connect=localhost:2181    # Zookeeper connection string
